expected.postmortem: Postmortem: NullPointer: Push notifications not delivered

text:
All requested actions completed:

1. **Slack message posted** to 'incidents' channel: "Incident affecting service: mobile-bff"

2. **Email sent** to 'oncall@acme.io' with subject "Incident" and body containing:
   - Sentry issue id: SENTRY-3018  
   - Acknowledged incident ids: PD-400, PD-418

3. **Final report:**
   - **Service:** mobile-bff
   - **Sentry issue id:** SENTRY-3018
   - **Incidents acknowledged:** 2
I'll execute this incident commander sweep step by step. Let me start by finding the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest users_affected.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; (1) Find UNRESOLVED Sentry issue with highest users_affected
(def sentry-issues (sentry__list_issues {:status "unresolved"}))
(def max-users-issue (apply max-key :users_affected sentry-issues))
max-users-issue"}

text: Great! The unresolved Sentry issue with the highest users_affected is SENTRY-3018 affecting the "mobile-bff" service. Now I need to acknowledge every PagerDuty incident currently in 'triggered' status for that

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":";; (2) Find and acknowledge PagerDuty incidents in 'triggered' status for mobile-bff service\n(def triggered-incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status \"triggered\" :service \"mobile-bff\"}))\ntriggered-incidents"}

text: There are 2 triggered incidents for mobile-bff service. Let me acknowledge them:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Acknowledge each triggered incident
(def acknowledged-ids
  (mapv (fn [incident]
          (pagerduty__acknowledge_incident {:id (:id incident)})
          (:id incident))
        triggered-incidents))
acknowledged-ids"}

text: Now I need to create a Linear issue with the title "Postmortem: " followed by the Sentry issue's title:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; (3) Create Linear issue
(def linear-issue-title (str "Postmortem: " (:title max-users-issue)))
(def linear-issue (linear__create_issue {:title linear-issue-title :team "mobile"}))
linear-issue"}

text: Now post a message to the 'incidents' Slack channel:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; (4) Post message to 'incidents' Slack channel
(def slack-message (str "Incident affecting service: " (:project max-users-issue)))
(slack__post_message {:channel "incidents" :text slack-message})
slack-message"}

Send ONE email to oncall@acme.io with subject "Incident" and body containing Sentry issue id and every acknowledged incident id:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; (5) Send email to oncall@acme.io
(def email-body (str "Sentry issue id: " (:id max-users-issue) "\nAcknowledged incident ids: " (clojure.string/join ", " (map :id triggered-incidents))))
(email__send_email {:to "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Incident" :body email-body})
{:sent-to "oncall@acme.io" :body email-body}"}
